Legal

Last updated: March 1, 2026

This page provides legal information about Solarity AI LLC, including company registration details, a legal disclaimer, and copyright notice. For questions, please contact us at info@solarityai.com.

Company Information

The website solarityai.com is operated by:

Solarity AI LLC
310 Gran Via
Irving, TX 75039
United States of America

Email: info@solarityai.com
Website: www.solarityai.com

Solarity AI LLC is a limited liability company organized and existing under the laws of the State of Texas, United States of America.

Legal Disclaimer

The information provided on this website is for general informational purposes only. While we strive to keep the content accurate, complete, and up to date, Solarity AI LLC makes no representations or warranties of any kind, express or implied, about the completeness, accuracy, reliability, suitability, or availability of the website or the information, products, services, or related graphics contained on the website for any purpose.

Any reliance you place on such information is therefore strictly at your own risk. In no event will Solarity AI LLC, its officers, directors, employees, or agents be liable for any loss or damage, including without limitation, indirect or consequential loss or damage, or any loss or damage whatsoever arising from the use of or reliance on information published on this website.

This website may contain links to external websites that are not provided or maintained by Solarity AI. Please note that Solarity AI does not guarantee the accuracy, relevance, timeliness, or completeness of any information on these external websites. The inclusion of any links does not necessarily imply a recommendation or endorsement of the views expressed within them.

Every effort is made to keep the website up and running smoothly. However, Solarity AI takes no responsibility for, and will not be liable for, the website being temporarily unavailable due to technical issues beyond our control.

Nothing on this website constitutes legal, financial, investment, tax, or professional advice. You should consult a qualified professional for advice specific to your situation before making any decisions based on information found on this website.

Copyright Notice

© 2026 Solarity AI LLC. All rights reserved.

All content on this website — including but not limited to text, graphics, logos, icons, images, audio clips, digital downloads, data compilations, and software — is the property of Solarity AI LLC and is protected by applicable United States and international copyright laws.

Reproduction or redistribution of any content from this website in any form is prohibited without the express written permission of Solarity AI LLC. Requests for permission to reproduce or distribute any content from this site should be sent to info@solarityai.com.

The Solarity AI name, logo, and all related names, logos, product and service names, designs, and slogans are trademarks of Solarity AI LLC. You may not use such marks without the prior written permission of Solarity AI LLC.

Additional Policies

For more detailed information about how we handle your data and govern our services, please review:

  • Privacy Policy — How we collect, use, and protect your personal information.
  • Terms of Service — The terms and conditions governing your use of our website and services.
